Environmental Protection.summary: Consistently opposes environmental regulations that restrict energy development and has voted against climate-focused legislation.
voted_for: Keystone XL Pipeline approval (Senate vote, 2015)
Energy Infrastructure Act supporting fossil fuel projects (Senate vote, 2021)
voted_against: Inflation Reduction Act containing climate provisions (Senate vote, August 2022)
EPA methane regulations (Congressional Review Act resolution, 2023)

Criminal Justice Reform.summary: Supported bipartisan criminal justice reform focused on sentencing and prison reform.
voted_for: First Step Act (Senate vote, December 2018)

Progressive Taxation.summary: Opposes tax increases on corporations and high earners, supports tax cuts.
voted_for: Tax Cuts and Jobs Act (Senate vote, December 2017)
voted_against: Build Back Better Act with tax increases on wealthy (Senate procedural votes, 2021-2022)

Cannabis Policy.summary: Has opposed federal legalization of marijuana.
voted_against: Cannabis Administration and Opportunity Act (Committee opposition, 2022)

Reproductive Health Rights.summary: Supports restrictions on abortion access and has voted for anti-abortion legislation.
voted_for: Pain-Capable Unborn Child Protection Act (Senate vote, 2018)
voted_against: Women's Health Protection Act (Senate vote, February 2022)
Women's Health Protection Act second vote (Senate vote, May 2022)
